name: iPower Inc.
summary: PART I ITEM 1. DESCRIPTION OF BUSINESS Our Business iPower Inc. (formerly BZRTH, Inc.), a California-based corporation, was formed in Nevada in April 2018 (iPower, we, or us). Driven by tech and data, iPower is an online retailer and supplier of consumer home, pet, garden products, outdoor and consumer electronics, as well as a provider of value-added ecommerce services for third-party products and brands. iPower's capabilities include a full spectrum of online channels, robust fulfillment capac...
